name: codehamr-ui
description: Desktop coding harness for the CodeHamr agent

scripts.build: npm run build -w @codehamr-ui/protocol && npm run build -w @codehamr-ui/desktop
scripts.dist:win: npm run agent:build && npm run fetch:busybox && npm run build && npm run dist:win -w @codehamr-ui/desktop
scripts.dist:mac: npm run agent:build && npm run build && npm run dist:mac -w @codehamr-ui/desktop
scripts.dist:linux: npm run agent:build && npm run build && npm run dist:linux -w @codehamr-ui/desktop
